double_ratchet.dh_public: Public Diffie-Hellman key shared with the other party. Used with the peer private key during DH ratchet updates.
double_ratchet.dh_private: Private Diffie-Hellman key. It must remain secret and is combined with the peer public key to derive fresh secrets.
double_ratchet.root_key: Master secret state of the ratchet. It evolves after DH steps and is used to derive new chain keys.
double_ratchet.sending_chain: Current sender chain key. Advanced for each outgoing message to produce a one-time message key.
double_ratchet.receiving_chain: Current receiver chain key. Advanced for each incoming message to reproduce the correct message key.
